## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation you are experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## AI CLI Context

Is this feature specific to a particular AI CLI tool?

- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] OpenAI Codex CLI
- [ ] GitHub Copilot CLI
- [ ] Gemini CLI
- [ ] All AI CLIs
- [ ] Not AI-specific

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or references that would help explain the feature.
